name: state-chip-rail
title: State Chip Rail
description: A rail of mono status chips advances a seek-safe data-state snap machine on a cue schedule: active chip ink on surface, done chips dim, pending chips hollow, optional badges pop beside one state.
evidence: Wave J J2-3: generalizes the flagship agent-console status rail (cohere-north frame 04 data-state snap machine)

variables.label: States
variables.description: Comma-separated chip labels in machine order (2 to 8 states).

variables.label: Times
variables.description: Comma-separated activation times in seconds, one per advance (state 1 onward). Blank entries use the default even rhythm.

variables.label: Badge state
variables.description: Index of the state the badges pop beside.

variables.label: Badges
variables.description: Comma-separated badge labels shown beside the badge state. Empty disables.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Accent token family used by the active chip.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the rail leaves the frame. Default none: the hold ends the film.
